flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Campbellsville University rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($25.0k → $28.0k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Campbellsville University rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($25.0k → $28.0k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Campbellsville University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.2% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Campbellsville University rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 (35.8% → 42.0%).
